description_long: This is a futuristic, combat-style airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and four prominent wings arranged in an X-formation. The wings are equipped with visible weaponry and yellow-tipped missile pods, suggesting a military or tactical function. The cockpit is centrally located and enclosed with a dark, transparent canopy, providing a streamlined appearance. The engines are mounted at the rear of the fuselage, with exhaust ports visible, and the overall surface is finished in a dark, metallic color scheme with weathered textures. The airplane features detailed panel lines, mechanical components, and reinforced structural elements, giving it a robust and high-tech look. The design is reminiscent of science fiction or advanced aerospace vehicles, with a focus on agility and firepower.
description: A dark, angular, X-wing style combat airplane with missile pods, rear-mounted engines, and a central enclosed cockpit, finished in a weathered metallic scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the X-shaped wing configuration, central cockpit canopy, and prominent missile pods under each wing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, rear-mounted engines, and the profile of the cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhausts, the symmetry of the wings, and the angular tail section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the wing-mounted weaponry and overall aircraft profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, X-configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets; slight dihedral angle for stability.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with two main gear units and one nose gear (not fully visible but implied by design).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark canopy integrated into the fuselage.
